hero.name: Bensmina yassir
hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.description: Passionate about code, design, and modern technologies. I build performant, elegant, and scalable web applications.

about.title: About
about.intro: I am a Full Stack Developer passionate about creating modern and intuitive web experiences.
about.text: I studied at OFPPT Ifrane, Web Full Stack option. I am currently completing a one-year training in computer development at the Al Akhawayn Community Center. I don't have professional experience yet, but I completed a one-month internship at the Commune of Ifrane where I developed a stock management system. I specialize in web development with expertise in HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript, PHP, and Laravel, and I am always looking for new challenges to improve my skills.
about.philosophy: My philosophy: clean code, polished UI, and impeccable user experience.

project1.title: Cyber Prep — Nexus QCM
project1.description: Competition preparation application via interactive MCQs. Designed for developers, it covers everything they need: Linux, networks, algorithms, and more. Ranking, sessions, and accuracy tracking included.

project2.title: MongoDB Quiz (Test Project)
project2.description: Small quiz application created to test and practice MongoDB and full stack development. Code available on GitHub.

project3.title: AtlasMat — Equipment Management
project3.description: Complete equipment management web application developed during my internship at the Commune of Ifrane. Laravel backend (REST API) and React frontend with dashboard, assignments, supplies, and history.

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.intro: Have a project in mind? A collaboration? Don't hesitate to contact me, I'll respond as soon as possible.
